research_history_boundary.density_preflight_disclosure: a stricter draft requiring per-book positive buy odds and min(volume-rank,ticket-rank) was retired before freeze because it produced only 12 train clocks at Q=0.65; source-only counts, composition, and control overlap for the revised definition were seen through 2023, but no OHLC, return, funding, CAGR, or drawdown outcome was opened
research_history_boundary.consequence: 2023 is support-seen but outcome-sealed; it may reject the frozen train-selected Q and may never reselect or repair it
research_history_boundary.support_only_access_allowed: current and past source rows, causal feature distributions, event counts, timestamps, composition, and clock overlap only

novelty_boundary.distinct_axis: breadth of BTC-denominated spot participation in the BTCEUR, BTCTRY, and BTCBRL fiat-quote books relative to BTCUSDT, with cross-book relative taker pressure and no price confirmation

nearest_existing_families.kimchi_fx: uses a single KRW price premium and FX state; FQPR excludes KRW and all price/FX fields and requires three-book flow breadth
nearest_existing_families.spot_perp_flow: uses BTCUSDT execution microstructure; FQPR uses relative daily participation and taker alignment from three fiat-quote books
nearest_existing_families.ticket_migration: uses derivatives ticket topology; FQPR uses spot trade-count share only as one of two fiat-quote participation dimensions

forbidden_repairs_after_outcomes: add a price or regime gate
change fiat-quote symbols or reference symbol
change rolling history or rank definition
remove volume ticket or taker alignment

source_contract.gap_policy: never fill or carry stale fiat-quote data; current day and all strictly prior rank lookbacks must be complete for all four symbols; zero taker-buy or taker-sell volume is unavailable, not clipped or repaired with a pseudocount

causal_feature_contract.availability: source day d is usable only after its close_time; signal at d close waits one complete five-minute bucket and enters at d+1 00:05 UTC
causal_feature_contract.lagged_ranks: R_V and R_N are empirical mid-ranks (count(prior<current) + 0.5*count(prior==current))/180 against exactly complete source days d-180..d-1; current d is excluded and no fallback is allowed
causal_feature_contract.setup: B[d]>=2 AND F[d]>0 on a false-to-true transition; continuous true runs create one episode only

support_calibration.vary_only: participation quantile Q in the frozen policy grid
support_calibration.selection_rule: select the highest Q passing every 2021-2022 support, composition, and novelty floor; 2023 may only pass or reject that frozen Q and cannot select a fallback
support_calibration.book_involvement_definition: fraction of non-overlapping primary entries whose signal day has that fiat-quote book has P_r>=Q, separately in train and 2023
support_calibration.pair_share_definition: largest exact participating-book set count divided by primary entries, separately in train and 2023
support_calibration.jaccard_definition: Jaccard of primary and control non-overlapping entry timestamps, calculated separately in train and 2023
support_calibration.failure_action: reject FQPR-3 before opening any outcome; never fall back to a lower Q after the train-selected Q sees 2023 support

execution_contract.decision_time: after source day d closes at 23:59:59.999 UTC
execution_contract.entry: d+1 00:05 UTC open, after the complete 00:00-00:05 availability bar
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open after 864 held five-minute bars (72 hours)
execution_contract.clock_reservation: reserve each policy globally over the complete pre-2024 clock, then slice only trades whose signal, entry, and exit are fully contained inside the requested evaluation window; causal rank history may precede a split start but never the source start or signal day
execution_contract.funding: exact realized BTCUSDT settlements on [entry, exit)
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry high-water; entry cost; favorable-before-adverse held OHLC; exact funding; hypothetical liquidation and exit cost
execution_contract.cagr_clock: full wall-clock split including warm-up and idle cash

falsification_controls.direction_flip: same primary clock, exact SHORT side
falsification_controls.no_ticket: own clock with breadth sum(1[R_V>=Q])>=2 and F>0, omitting R_N
falsification_controls.no_taker: own clock with breadth sum(1[P_r>=Q])>=2, omitting F>0
falsification_controls.volume_only: own clock with breadth sum(1[R_V>=Q])>=2, omitting ticket and taker
falsification_controls.flow_only: own episode clock requiring F>0 only
falsification_controls.single_book_eur: own clock from P_EUR>=Q AND E_EUR>0 transitions
falsification_controls.single_book_try: own clock from P_TRY>=Q AND E_TRY>0 transitions
falsification_controls.single_book_brl: own clock from P_BRL>=Q AND E_BRL>0 transitions
falsification_controls.usdt_only: own clock where U=(own prior-180 raw-volume rank + own raw-trade rank)/2>=Q and O_u>0
falsification_controls.reference_suppression: own clock where U<=1-Q and F>0, testing whether a quiet BTCUSDT denominator alone explains the relative-share signal
falsification_controls.absolute_book_participation: own clock requiring at least two fiat-quote books whose mean own raw-volume and raw-trade prior-180 ranks are >=Q, plus F>0
falsification_controls.one_day_signal_delay: same primary signal shifted one full UTC day
falsification_controls.random_side: same primary clock with seed-20260717 Rademacher side

statistical_test_contract.null: independent Rademacher sign applied to each weekly cluster
statistical_test_contract.statistic: mean net account return per trade

control_comparison_contract.stage1: primary train ratio must be strictly greater than every mechanism-control train ratio; equality rejects
control_comparison_contract.stage2: min(primary train ratio, primary 2023 ratio) must be strictly greater than min(control train ratio, control 2023 ratio) for every mechanism control; equality rejects
control_comparison_contract.promotion: no control may replace the singleton primary

orthogonality_after_standalone_pass.duplicate_policy: collapse exact PnL hashes and compare against every canonical family representative plus the synchronized selected portfolios

rejection_contract: any support or staged performance failure retires FQPR-3 without threshold, side, symbol, feature, delay, hold, or gate repair
